---
title: "Relapse Analysis"
format: html
---

## Relapse Analysis Activity

A lapse back to alcohol use does not begin when you take a drink of alcohol. Often, things that happen before you drink indicate the beginning of a lapse. Identifying your patterns of behavior will help you recognize and interrupt the lapse.

![](https://github.com/jjcurtin/aud_support/blob/main/modules/images/footprints.png?raw=true){fig-align="center"}

::: callout
### Instructions

-   Think back to the week leading up to your last lapse.

-   Fill in each category with the events, behaviors, and thoughts you experienced.

-   Reflect on your feelings about each event.
:::

| **Category** | **Events** | **Patterns of Behavior** | Feelings About the Events |
|-------------------|------------------|------------------|------------------|
| Subject / Career Events |  |  |  |
| Personal Events |  |  |  |
| Treatment Events |  |  |  |
| Alcohol-Related Behaviors |  |  |  |
| Behavioral Patterns |  |  |  |
| Relapse Thoughts |  |  |  |
| Health Status |  |  |  |
